title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIO JUAN CARTAS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABA, PROVINCE OF LA UNION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17256 / 65 OG No. 47, 13022 (November 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5580, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO JUAN CARTAS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABA, PROVINCE OF LA UNION.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sitio Bas-ang in the Municipality of Caba, Province of La Union, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as Barrio Juan Cartas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
